---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the editor integration
labels: enhancement
---

**What's missing / what would help**
A clear description of the behavior you'd like.

**Why**
The workflow it unblocks or the friction it removes.

**Notes**
Anything about the `errors-ai.log` format is a public API — see
[docs/FORMAT.md](https://github.com/stacktale/stacktale/blob/main/docs/FORMAT.md).
